tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text:
The importance of a balanced diet is something that health professionals have stressed for decades. A 1.1. _________ meal plan should include a wide 1.2. _________ of foods from different groups, ensuring the body receives all the vitamins and minerals it needs.

Many people in the modern world suffer from a 1.3. _________ of key nutrients such as iron, vitamin D, and calcium, often because they rely too heavily on highly 1.4. _________ foods that are low in nutritional value. These products may be convenient, but they often cause 1.5. _________ problems and contribute to long-term health issues.

The 1.6. _________ from most dietitians is to fill at least half your plate with fruit and vegetables at every meal. Whole grains, lean proteins, and dairy products are also 1.7. _________ — they provide essential nutrients that keep the body strong and energetic.

Raising 1.8. _________ about the impact of diet on both physical and mental health is now a priority in schools and workplaces across many countries.
